nasb.text: “So then, all Jews know my manner of life from my youth up, which from the beginning was spent among my own nation and at Jerusalem;

esv.text: “My manner of life from my youth, spent from the beginning among my own nation and in Jerusalem, is known by all the Jews.

cnv.text: 我從幼年到現在，在本國、在耶路撒冷為人怎樣，猶太人都知道。

ccb.text: “我从小在本族和耶路撒冷为人如何，犹太人都知道。

csbs.text: “事实上，我自幼的为人，从起初在自己的同胞中间，以及在耶路撒冷，所有的犹太人都知道。
